query: Vietnam General Statistics Office population 2025 official data
answer: Vietnam's population reached 102.3 million in December 2025, an increase of approximately 1 million from the previous year. This projection is based on official data from the General Statistics Office of Vietnam. The population growth reflects the country's demographic trends.

results.title: Vietnam's average population is projected to reach 102.3 million in ...
results.snippet: By 2025, Vietnam's average population is projected to reach 102.3 million people, an increase of approximately 1 million.
